channel.title: Blogs on KShut's Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Blogs on KShut's Portfolio

item.title: Image Resizing and Soundcloud embeds
item.description:
Posted on July 21, 2021

Image resizing

I finally figured out how to resize images through Hugo shortcodes. I mean, just look at this L O N G boi. He seems to be trapped in some pretty strict margins, but it’s fine as it is. I can also make him a T A L L boi too. I can also position him properly:

This is the only image I have so far, but I’ll add some more later.

Soundcloud embeds

I also managed to get soundcloud embeds working through shortcodes as well. As a dark theme user, I don’t really like their white background. There’s probably a way to change it through CSS or HTML, but I haven’t found a solution yet.

For now, they’ll just look like this:

item.title: The beginning of the website
item.description:
Posted on July 19, 2021

Today I felt like making a website. I mean, I had always meant to do it at one point, but I had always put it off until today. Github Pages and Hugo made it seem like it would be pretty easy to make one, but boy was I wrong. I spent pretty much all day trying to get it to work, but at least it seems to work now, even if it does look pretty barebones right now. I still gotta learn a bunch of stuff to make this blog look a little better, so I’ll work on this website for now before diving into other things.

I also need to figure out how to format images like this on these sites too lmao
